CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, content XML);

CREATE FUNCTION test_output_option (in cnt any, in opt_name any, in opt_value any) { declare xt, ses any; declare oldval, newval varchar; xt := xtree_doc (cnt, 2, '', 'UTF-8'); oldval := xml_doc_output_option (xt, opt_name); xml_doc_output_option (xt, opt_name, opt_value); newval := xml_doc_output_option (xt, opt_name); return concat (sprintf ('Old value of "%s" is "%s"
New value is "%s"
The result:
', opt_name, cast (oldval as varchar), cast (newval as varchar) ), serialize_to_UTF8_xml (xt) ); };
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'method', 'xml');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'version', '1.0');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'encoding', 'UTF-16');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'omit-xml-declaration', 'yes');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'standalone', 'no');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'doctype-public', 'PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional//EN"');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'doctype-system', 'http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-transitional.dtd');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'indent', 'yes');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'media-type', 'text/xml');
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'media-type', NULL);
SELECT test_output_option((SELECT content FROM xml_test WHERE id = 1), 'method', NULL);
